content:
This is my personal journal where I write articles about Information Security. I enjoy the world of Security - be it related to software or hardware or cloud. I have been a part of this domain since almost 12 years, where I started the official journey with getting a Master’s degree in Network Security, and then started working professionally with various organizations. I have worked in many fields of security, including Vulnerability Management, Application Security, Security Analystics, Threat Hunting, Forensics, Penetration Testing, Auditing.
Currently working as a Senior Pentester, finding security issues in Cloud, Web and Mobile applications.
For any feedback or comments regarding my blog, you can connect with me on my email: bhumish[@]live[.]com

content: My journal where I write mostly about Information Security, and sometimes I try to fit in a few personal achievements and travel stories. #
